{{Quote|Sure I remember the battle of Denubba. It was quite a spectacle.|[[Maxine Baytor]]|<ref name="Challenge" />}}
The '''battle of Denubba''' was a battle fought at [[Denubba]] during the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Maxine Baytor]] led the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] forces and thought it was a spectacle later in her life.
